seo.title: Healthcare Assistant Jobs in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Healthcare assistant jobs with flexibility, purpose, and growth potential. Apply for HCA, support worker, and care roles across London care homes and residential care settings.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Careers | Healthcare Assistant Jobs
fields.sub: Healthcare assistant jobs with flexibility, purpose, and growth potential are available now at Vigil Care Staffing.

fields.heading: Explore Rewarding Healthcare Assistant Jobs and Care Careers
fields.body: We offer rewarding opportunities for HCAs, support workers, and cleaners across care homes, supported living, and residential care settings. Whether you're new to care or an experienced professional, we have roles to match your skills, availability, and career goals.

fields.heading: Roles We Recruit For
fields.body: We are currently hiring for a range of care roles including: Healthcare Assistant (HCA) Jobs Support Worker Jobs Caregiver Jobs HCA Careers in Nursing Homes and Residential Care Care Jobs with Immediate Start

items.title: Submit Your CV
items.body: Please the application form above, upload your CV and cover letter and wait to hear from us

items.title: Screening & Interview
items.body: Our recruitment team will contact you to discuss your experience and availability.

items.title: Compliance & Training
items.body: We support you through background checks and mandatory training.

items.title: Start Your First Shift
items.body: Once cleared, we match you with the right job opportunities near you.

items.q: What types of healthcare assistant jobs do you offer?
items.a: We offer temporary, permanent, and flexible HCA roles in care homes, supported living, and home care settings

items.q: Do you provide training for new care workers?
items.a: Yes, we provide mandatory training and continuous development to support your care career

items.q: What are the requirements for caregiver jobs?
items.a: You must have the right to work in the UK, pass a DBS check, and ideally have some care experience or a willingness to learn.

items.q: Can I choose my own shifts?
items.a: Yes! We offer flexible shifts to match your availability – including days, nights, and weekends.
Once compliance is completed, many of our applicants start working within a week.

fields.heading: Apply here
fields.sub: Whether you're exploring a new career in health and social care or looking to expand your experience as an HCA, we welcome passionate, dedicated care professionals to join our team.
